creator: kashmir@umiacs.UMD.EDU
text:
portmap.8's synopsis doesn't include the -v switch.

Fix: 

--- 1.1	1995/08/05 19:10:43
+++ portmap.8	1995/08/05 19:11:59
@@ -45,6 +45,7 @@
 .Sh SYNOPSIS
 .Nm portmap
 .Op Fl d
+.Op Fl v
 .Sh DESCRIPTION
 .Nm Portmap
 is a server that converts
How-To-Repeat: 
man portmap
